## Bible conformance (required)

- [ ] I have read the relevant Bible chapter(s) in `docs/bible`.
- [ ] This change does **not** contradict any of the nine ordered principles.
- [ ] This change does **not** violate the Chapter 1 anti-scope.
- [ ] If it touches a decision, the decision ID is referenced and, if changed, the
      Bible is amended with a version bump (Phase 0 section 0.6).

## Privacy & security (required)

- [ ] No new network egress is introduced, or it is routed through the consent-gated
      egress chokepoint and documented.
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or user data are committed.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes reference the threat model (Chapter 15) where applicable.
